codeReview.summary: CI verification feature delivered the requested outcomes: gate scripts were stabilized for strict Bash mode, gate-fast and Docker build were validated, migration_v2 remained explicitly active in workflow env, and README now documents CI-specific DIFF_BASE and Docker invocation details. Compatibility guards were added for legacy contract/doc checks so Factory-droid branch can run gates in its current layout.

sharedStateObservations.observation: When Task subagents are unavailable due model-alias resolution errors, scrutiny validation still proceeds via manual evidence review; this fallback is currently implicit and should be documented in validator procedure guidance.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: In this session, Task invocations for scrutiny-feature-reviewer failed with `Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.3-codex-xhigh-pro`, requiring manual report generation for both reviewed features.

summary: PASS. CI pipeline verification changes satisfy VAL-CLEAN-003 intent and are backed by successful gate-fast, compile, script, and Docker-build evidence.
